---
title: "Alice Rolfe"
---

## Alice Rolfe

**Dates:** (b. Otterbourne 1860/1)

**Maiden name:** (Misselbrook)

### Description

mistress of Otterbourne school

### Biography

The wife of [[person:1256]Alfred Rolfe] and daughter of Robert Misselbrook, shoemaker, of Otterbourne, she was mistress of the infant school at Otterbourne, until she gave it up on marrying Alfred Rolfe, the schoolmaster in 1888.  She was the youngest sister of Ellen Misselbrook. [1861 census, Otterbourne; 1891 census]

### Letters

- Letter from [August 1893]
- Letter from Sept 5th 1888
- Letter from June 22d [1888]
- Letter from Novr 8 th 1878
- Letter from Sept 17th 1878
- Letter from June 17th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
